name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      commit_fixture:
        description: "Commit fixture to use: patch, minor, major, none"
        required: false
        default: "minor"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test-patch-bump:
    name: Test Patch Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-patch
          echo "1.0.0" > /tmp/semver-test-patch/version.txt

      - name: Run patch bump
        id: patch-bump
        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = Get-Content './fixtures/patch-commits.txt'
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-patch/version.txt' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '1.0.1') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 1.0.1 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: patch bump 1.0.0 -> 1.0.1'
          "

  test-minor-bump:
    name: Test Minor Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-minor
          echo "1.1.0" > /tmp/semver-test-minor/version.txt

      - name: Run minor bump
        id: minor-bump
        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = Get-Content './fixtures/minor-commits.txt'
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-minor/version.txt' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '1.2.0') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 1.2.0 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: minor bump 1.1.0 -> 1.2.0'
          "

  test-major-bump:
    name: Test Major Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-major
          echo "1.2.3" > /tmp/semver-test-major/version.txt

      - name: Run major bump
        id: major-bump
        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = Get-Content './fixtures/major-commits.txt'
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-major/version.txt' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '2.0.0') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 2.0.0 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: major bump 1.2.3 -> 2.0.0'
          "

  test-no-bump:
    name: Test No Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-none
          echo "3.0.0" > /tmp/semver-test-none/version.txt

      - name: Run no-bump scenario
        id: no-bump
        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = Get-Content './fixtures/no-bump-commits.txt'
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-none/version.txt' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '3.0.0') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 3.0.0 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            if (\$result.BumpType -ne 'none') {
              Write-Error \"Expected bump type 'none' but got \$(\$result.BumpType)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: no bump, version stays 3.0.0'
          "

  test-package-json:
    name: Test package.json Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-pkg
          echo '{"name":"test-package","version":"2.3.4"}' > /tmp/semver-test-pkg/package.json

      - name: Run package.json bump
        id: pkg-bump
        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = @('feat: add new API endpoint', 'fix: handle timeout')
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-pkg/package.json' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '2.4.0') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 2.4.0 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: package.json minor bump 2.3.4 -> 2.4.0'
          "

  run-pester-tests:
    name: Run All Pester Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Install Pester

name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      commit_fixture:
        description: "Commit fixture to use: patch, minor, major, none"
        required: false
        default: "minor"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test-patch-bump:
    name: Test Patch Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-patch
          echo "1.0.0" > /tmp/semver-test-patch/version.txt

      - name: Run patch bump
        id: patch-bump
        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = Get-Content './fixtures/patch-commits.txt'
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-patch/version.txt' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '1.0.1') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 1.0.1 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: patch bump 1.0.0 -> 1.0.1'
          "

  test-minor-bump:
    name: Test Minor Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-minor
          echo "1.1.0" > /tmp/semver-test-minor/version.txt

      - name: Run minor bump

        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'
            \$commits = Get-Content './fixtures/minor-commits.txt'
            \$result = Invoke-SemanticVersionBump -VersionFile '/tmp/semver-test-minor/version.txt' -Commits \$commits
            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '1.2.0') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 1.2.0 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: minor bump 1.1.0 -> 1.2.0'
          "

  test-major-bump:
    name: Test Major Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-major
          echo "1.2.3" > /tmp/semver-test-major/version.txt

        run: |
          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'

            Write-Output \"OLD_VERSION=\$(\$result.OldVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"NEW_VERSION=\$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
            Write-Output \"BUMP_TYPE=\$(\$result.BumpType)\"
            if (\$result.NewVersion -ne '2.0.0') {
              Write-Error \"Expected 2.0.0 but got \$(\$result.NewVersion)\"
              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: major bump 1.2.3 -> 2.0.0'
          "

  test-no-bump:
    name: Test No Version Bump
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update -q
          sudo apt-get install -y -q powershell

      - name: Set up test environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p /tmp/semver-test-none
          echo "3.0.0" > /tmp/semver-test-none/version.txt

      - name: Run no-bump scenario

          pwsh -NoProfile -Command "
            . './SemanticVersionBumper.ps1'

              exit 1
            }
            Write-Output 'ASSERTION PASSED: package.json minor bump 2.3.4 -> 2.4.0'

**Files created:**
- `SemanticVersionBumper.ps1` — core implementation with 6 functions:
  - `Get-BumpType` — parses conventional commits (feat!/BREAKING CHANGE→major, feat→minor, fix→patch, else→none)
  - `Get-NextVersion` — computes next semver
  - `Read-VersionFromFile` — reads version from `version.txt` or `package.json`
  - `Write-VersionToFile` — updates either file type
  - `New-ChangelogEntry` — groups commits by type into a formatted changelog
  - `Invoke-SemanticVersionBump` — orchestrates all the above

- `SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1` — **36 Pester tests** covering all functions, including workflow structure tests and actionlint validation

- `fixtures/` — 4 mock commit log files (patch, minor, major, no-bump)

  - package.json: `2.3.4 → 2.4.0`
  - Pester: 36 tests all pass in container

- `act-result.txt` — captured output from all 6 act runs, every job succeeded
